call_transcript:
Agent: Hi Eleanor, this is Mark calling from Finance Solutions. I see you recently filled out a form online regarding a Personal Loan. Um, how are you doing today? 
Eleanor: Good, thanks. 
Agent: Great! So, we're pre-approving you for a $10,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 8.99%.  That's right, 8.99%.  Now, what were you hoping to use the funds for, if you don't mind me asking? 
Eleanor: Just some home improvements, you know, a new kitchen countertop. 
Agent: Excellent! A kitchen upgrade is a fantastic investment.  Now, with this loan, you'd have fixed monthly payments over a term of, say, five years.  We can adjust that, of course.  The total cost, including interest, would be… let me just calculate… around $11,500. Does that sound manageable? 
Eleanor: Hmm, that's… okay. What are the fees like? 
Agent: There's a small origination fee of $150, and that's it, really. No prepayment penalties.  We pride ourselves on transparency. 
Eleanor: Okay. And the monthly payment? 
Agent: Approximately $214 a month.  We can get you all the details in writing, of course.  So, are you interested in proceeding with the application? 
Eleanor: Yeah, okay. Let's do it.

Agent: Hello, Mr. Miller? This is Sarah calling from Finance Solutions. We're offering a special promotion on our Signature Credit Card. 
Robert: Where did you get my number? I didn't give anyone permission to call me. 
Agent: Sir, we… uh… it's a marketing list. We're offering a $2,500 credit line at 19.99%. 
Robert: 19.99?! Are you kidding me? That's outrageous! I already have a credit card. 
Agent: Well, sir, this card offers rewards points and… 
Robert: No, thank you. Don't call me again. *click*

Agent: Hi Jessica, this is David from Finance Solutions. I'm calling regarding a Personal Loan. Your friend, Michael, referred you. 
Jessica: Oh, hey! Yeah, he mentioned you guys. I'm thinking about consolidating some debt. 
Agent: That's excellent! We can definitely help with that. We are pre-approving you for a $15,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 12.5%.  Does that sound like something you'd be interested in? 
Jessica: Maybe. What's the catch? 
Agent: No catch! Just a standard loan with fixed monthly payments. We can tailor the term to fit your budget.  We have options from 3 to 7 years. 
Jessica: Okay. What about fees? I hate hidden fees. 
Agent: Absolutely. There's a $200 origination fee, and that's it. No annual fees, no prepayment penalties.  We're very upfront about everything.  The monthly payment, depending on the term, would be around $330 to $450. 
Jessica: Hmm, okay.  Can you send me a breakdown of all the costs? Like, a full amortization schedule? 
Agent: Absolutely! I can email that to you right away.  Just confirm your email address is jessica.chen@email.com? 
Jessica: Yes, that's correct. 
Agent: Perfect. I'll send that over now.  And we can schedule a follow-up call tomorrow to discuss it further?

Agent: Hello, Mr. Lee? This is Kevin from Finance Solutions. We're offering a great deal on our Signature Credit Card. 
David: (Interrupting) Look, you guys called me *yesterday*! I told you I'm not interested! Where did you even get my number?! 
Agent: Sir, I apologize for the inconvenience. We… uh… 
David: Inconvenience?! This is harassment! I want my number removed from your list *immediately*! 
Agent: Sir, I can certainly… 
David: No, you can't! Just… *click*.

Agent: Hello, Mrs. Rodriguez? This is Lisa calling from Finance Solutions. I see you inquired about a Personal Loan on our website. 
Maria: Oh, yes, hello. I did. I'm a little hard of hearing, so could you speak up a bit? 
Agent: Of course, absolutely. We are pre-approving you for a $7,500 Personal Loan at a rate of 15.5%.  That's 15.5%.  What were you hoping to use the funds for? 
Maria: Well, my grandson needs help with his college tuition. It's… a lot of money. 
Agent: That's wonderful of you to help him! We can certainly help you with that. With this loan, you'd have predictable monthly payments. We can look at a term of, say, four years. 
Maria: Four years… hmm. What would the payments be? 
Agent: Approximately $190 a month. There's a $100 origination fee, but no other hidden costs. 
Maria: Could you… could you repeat that monthly payment amount? I want to make sure I understand. 
Agent: Certainly! $190 a month.  And I can email you a detailed breakdown of all the costs, including the amortization schedule. 
Maria: That would be lovely. Yes, please do. 
Agent: Great! I'll send that over right away.  And I'll follow up with you tomorrow to see if you have any questions.
